procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1550.003
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1550.003 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

osquery.name: t1550_003_proc_hidden
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1550_003_file_mod
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime, atime FROM file WHERE (path LIKE '/tmp/%' OR path LIKE '/dev/shm/%' OR path LIKE '/var/tmp/%') AND mtime > (strftime('%s','now') - 3600) LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1550_003_ssh_keys
osquery.query_text: SELECT uid, path, filename, size, mtime FROM file WHERE path LIKE '%/.ssh/%' LIMIT 50;
